name: I have back problems already, slipped at work—will they pay?

mainEntity.name: I have back problems already, slipped at work—will they pay?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if the fall aggravated your pre-existing condition, workers' comp covers the worsening in Utah/Idaho.** Not denied for prior issues.[1] Key factors: (1) Doctor opinion on aggravation; (2) Objective tests show change; (3) No baseline records hurt less. Get specialist eval. Attorney fights 'pre-existing' denials.
